raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and declarative commitment to revised relational patterns",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "prior patterns involved collapse, overgiving, and lack of mutuality",
    "these new behaviors are under the speaker's direct control",
    "mutuality, non-collapse, and co-regulation are clearly definable states",
    "the speaker's internal state can be reliably monitored and adjusted in real time"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; each clause reinforces a single axis of balanced, non-self-abandoning relating",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker possesses accurate self-observation, the commitments map to observable behaviors, and repetition is paired with accountability or feedback",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "terms remain undefined so speaker can retroactively reinterpret actions; statement functions as virtue signal without behavioral change; used to preempt feedback from others"
}
